song.title: Your Grace Is Enough
song.author: Matt Maher
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C P V3 V4
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G G/B C2 (x2) .G G/B C2 Great is your faithfulness oh God .Em D/F# C2 You wrestle with the sinner's heart .G G/B C2 You lead us by still waters into mercy .Em D/F# C2 And nothing can keep us apart
[P] . Am7 G/B C2 D So remember your people, Remember your children . Em D/F# C2 Remember your promise, oh God
[C] . G D Em C2 Your grace is enough, Your grace is enough. . G D C2 Your grace is enough for me.
[V2] Great is your love and justice, God. You use the weak to lead the strong. You lead us in the song of your salvation And all your people sing along.
[V3] Your Grace is enough, heaven reaching down to us Your Grace is enough for me
[V4] Your grace is enough, I'm covered in your love Your grace is enough for me
